prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘library serving the community’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「主要作為公共服務、而非商業營運的圖書館」？

example.text: I borrowed a travel guide from the public library.

translation.zh-Hant: 我從公共圖書館借了一本旅遊指南。

meaning.en: A library provided mainly as a public service rather than as a commercial business.
meaning.zh-Hant: 主要作為公共服務、而非商業營運的圖書館。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘arriving or approaching’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「正在進入或即將到達的」？

example.text: Please check the incoming shipment before signing for it.

translation.zh-Hant: 簽收前請先檢查即將到貨的貨物。

meaning.en: Coming in or about to arrive.
meaning.zh-Hant: 正在進入或即將到達的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ill during air travel’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因飛機晃動而感到暈眩或噁心的」？

example.text: I felt airsick during the flight, so I closed my eyes.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在飛行途中暈機，所以閉上眼睛休息。

meaning.en: Feeling sick because of the motion of an aircraft.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因飛機晃動而感到暈眩或噁心的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘returning home after time away’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「離家一段時間後返家的行為或場合」？

example.text: Her family planned a small dinner to celebrate her homecoming.

translation.zh-Hant: 她的家人安排了一頓小型晚餐，慶祝她返家。

meaning.en: The act or occasion of returning home after being away.
meaning.zh-Hant: 離家一段時間後返家的行為或場合。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘avoiding social contact’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不願意或無法正常與他人互動的」？

example.text: He is not unfriendly, but he becomes antisocial when he is tired.

translation.zh-Hant: 他並不冷漠，只是累的時候會不想與人來往。

meaning.en: Unwilling or unable to interact normally with other people.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不願意或無法正常與他人互動的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘side panel on a webpage’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「顯示在網頁側邊的資訊區塊」？

example.text: The sidebar shows links to related articles.

translation.zh-Hant: 網頁側欄顯示相關文章的連結。

meaning.en: A section of information displayed along the side of a webpage.
meaning.zh-Hant: 顯示在網頁側邊的資訊區塊。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person campaigning for change’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「積極推動政治或社會改變的人」？

example.text: The activist organized a peaceful campaign for safer streets.

translation.zh-Hant: 這名倡議者發起和平行動，爭取更安全的街道。

meaning.en: A person who actively campaigns for political or social change.
meaning.zh-Hant: 積極推動政治或社會改變的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘begin to understand’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「開始理解或察覺某件事」？

example.text: The new employee began to catch on after watching the process twice.

translation.zh-Hant: 新員工看了兩次流程後，開始明白該怎麼做。

meaning.en: To begin to understand or realize something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 開始理解或察覺某件事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘tactful handling of conflict’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與人交涉時避免或化解衝突的圓融技巧」？

example.text: Good diplomacy helped the two departments resolve the dispute.

translation.zh-Hant: 良好的溝通手腕幫助兩個部門化解了爭議。

meaning.en: Tact and skill in dealing with people to prevent or settle conflict.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與人交涉時避免或化解衝突的圓融技巧。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘impossible to separate’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「無法分開或無法視為彼此獨立的」？

example.text: The two childhood friends remained inseparable even after moving to different cities.

translation.zh-Hant: 這兩位兒時好友即使搬到不同城市後，依然形影不離。

meaning.en: Unable to be separated or treated as independent.
meaning.zh-Hant: 無法分開或無法視為彼此獨立的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who examines a case’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「負責查明事實與事件經過的人」？

example.text: The investigator interviewed everyone who witnessed the accident.

translation.zh-Hant: 調查員訪談了所有目擊這起事故的人。

meaning.en: A person whose job is to examine facts and discover what happened.
meaning.zh-Hant: 負責查明事實與事件經過的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘work of reporting news’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「採集、撰寫、編輯與呈現新聞的工作」？

example.text: She studied journalism because she wanted to report local news.

translation.zh-Hant: 她因為想報導地方新聞而攻讀新聞學。

meaning.en: The work of gathering, writing, editing, and presenting news.
meaning.zh-Hant: 採集、撰寫、編輯與呈現新聞的工作。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘butter substitute made from oils’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「主要以植物油製成、用來代替奶油的抹醬」？

example.text: The café offers margarine as an alternative to butter.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家咖啡館提供人造奶油作為奶油的替代品。

meaning.en: A spread made mainly from vegetable oils and used as a substitute for butter.
meaning.zh-Hant: 主要以植物油製成、用來代替奶油的抹醬。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘behave cruelly toward someone’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「惡劣或殘忍地對待人、動物或物品」？

example.text: The shelter will not allow anyone to mistreat the animals.

translation.zh-Hant: 收容所不允許任何人虐待動物。

meaning.en: To treat a person, animal, or thing badly or cruelly.
meaning.zh-Hant: 惡劣或殘忍地對待人、動物或物品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘change part of something’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「改變某事物的一部分，而非完全替換」？

example.text: We need to modify the schedule to include an earlier train.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們需要修改行程，加入一班更早的火車。

meaning.en: To change part of something without replacing it completely.
meaning.zh-Hant: 改變某事物的一部分，而非完全替換。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘designed for several players’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「允許多名玩家同時進行遊戲的」？

example.text: This multiplayer game lets four friends play at the same time.

translation.zh-Hant: 這款多人遊戲可讓四位朋友同時遊玩。

meaning.en: Allowing several people to play a game at the same time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 允許多名玩家同時進行遊戲的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘widely believed false idea’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「廣為流傳但並不正確的觀念」？

example.text: The article corrects the myth that cold weather alone causes colds.

translation.zh-Hant: 這篇文章澄清了單靠寒冷天氣就會引發感冒的迷思。

meaning.en: A widely held belief that is false.
meaning.zh-Hant: 廣為流傳但並不正確的觀念。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘by a small margin’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「僅以很小的差距；差一點地」？

example.text: We narrowly missed the last bus and had to call a taxi.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們差一點就趕上末班公車，只好叫計程車。

meaning.en: By only a small amount or margin.
meaning.zh-Hant: 僅以很小的差距；差一點地。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who stays up late’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「經常熬夜到很晚的人；夜貓子」？

example.text: As a night owl, I do my best work after everyone goes to bed.

translation.zh-Hant: 我是個夜貓子，大家睡覺後反而工作效率最好。

meaning.en: A person who regularly stays awake until late at night.
meaning.zh-Hant: 經常熬夜到很晚的人；夜貓子。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘longing for the past’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「對過去感到溫暖或感傷的懷念」？

example.text: I felt nostalgic when I found my old school photos.

translation.zh-Hant: 找到以前的校園照片時，我感到很懷念。

meaning.en: Feeling a warm or sad longing for the past.
meaning.zh-Hant: 對過去感到溫暖或感傷的懷念。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘closeness in distance or time’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在距離、時間或關係上接近的狀態」？

example.text: The hotel's proximity to the station made our trip easier.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店鄰近車站，讓我們的旅程方便許多。

meaning.en: The state of being near in distance, time, or relationship.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在距離、時間或關係上接近的狀態。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘system using reflected radio waves’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「利用反射的無線電波偵測物體並判定其位置或移動的系統」？

example.text: The airport uses radar to track aircraft during bad weather.

translation.zh-Hant: 機場利用雷達在惡劣天候中追蹤飛機。

meaning.en: A system that uses reflected radio waves to detect objects and determine their position or movement.
meaning.zh-Hant: 利用反射的無線電波偵測物體並判定其位置或移動的系統。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘act of starting again’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「再次啟動裝置、程序或活動的行為」？

example.text: A quick restart of the router restored the internet connection.

translation.zh-Hant: 快速重新啟動路由器後，網路連線就恢復了。

meaning.en: The act of starting a device, process, or activity again.
meaning.zh-Hant: 再次啟動裝置、程序或活動的行為。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘financial supporter receiving publicity’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為活動或節目出資，通常藉此換取宣傳的個人或組織」？

example.text: A local business became the main sponsor of the charity run.

translation.zh-Hant: 一家在地企業成為這場慈善路跑的主要贊助者。

meaning.en: A person or organization that pays toward an event or program, usually in exchange for publicity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為活動或節目出資，通常藉此換取宣傳的個人或組織。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who betrays trust’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「背叛他人信任或祕密的人」？

example.text: The group called him a traitor after he revealed their private plans.

translation.zh-Hant: 他洩露團體的私下計畫後，大家稱他為叛徒。

meaning.en: A person who betrays someone's trust or confidence.
meaning.zh-Hant: 背叛他人信任或祕密的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who studies information’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「仔細檢視資訊以理解或說明其意義的人」？

example.text: The analyst compared last quarter's sales figures with this quarter's.

translation.zh-Hant: 分析師比較了上一季與這一季的銷售數據。

meaning.en: A person who examines information carefully to understand or explain it.
meaning.zh-Hant: 仔細檢視資訊以理解或說明其意義的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘product that reduces sweating’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「塗在皮膚上以減少出汗的產品」？

example.text: I packed antiperspirant because the weather will be hot and humid.

translation.zh-Hant: 因為天氣會又熱又潮濕，我帶了止汗劑。

meaning.en: A product applied to the skin to reduce sweating.
meaning.zh-Hant: 塗在皮膚上以減少出汗的產品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘curved punctuation mark’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「撇號「’」，可用來表示省略或所有關係」？

example.text: Use an apostrophe to show that a letter has been omitted.

translation.zh-Hant: 使用撇號來表示有字母被省略。

meaning.en: The punctuation mark ’, used for purposes such as omission or possession.
meaning.zh-Hant: 撇號「’」，可用來表示省略或所有關係。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘achieve through effort’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「透過努力達成想要的結果」？

example.text: The team worked steadily to attain its annual sales goal.

translation.zh-Hant: 團隊持續努力，以達成年度銷售目標。

meaning.en: To achieve a desired result through effort.
meaning.zh-Hant: 透過努力達成想要的結果。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘laboratory analysis of blood’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「對血液樣本進行的實驗室分析」？

example.text: The doctor ordered a blood test to check my iron level.

translation.zh-Hant: 醫師安排了抽血檢查，以確認我的鐵含量。

meaning.en: A laboratory analysis performed on a sample of blood.
meaning.zh-Hant: 對血液樣本進行的實驗室分析。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘filled tortilla wrap’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用麵粉薄餅包裹豆類、肉類或起司等餡料的墨西哥料理」？

example.text: I ordered a bean burrito for a quick lunch.

translation.zh-Hant: 我午餐點了一份包豆類餡料的墨西哥捲餅，簡單解決一餐。

meaning.en: A flour tortilla wrapped around a filling such as beans, meat, or cheese.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用麵粉薄餅包裹豆類、肉類或起司等餡料的墨西哥料理。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person making a phone call’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「打電話的人；來電者」？

example.text: The caller left a number and asked me to return the call.

translation.zh-Hant: 來電者留下電話號碼，請我回電。

meaning.en: A person who makes a telephone call.
meaning.zh-Hant: 打電話的人；來電者。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘official confirmation process’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「正式確認已符合規定要求的行為或程序」？

example.text: The equipment must pass safety certification before it can be sold.

translation.zh-Hant: 這項設備必須通過安全認證才能販售。

meaning.en: The act or process of officially confirming that requirements have been met.
meaning.zh-Hant: 正式確認已符合規定要求的行為或程序。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘local public gathering place’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供當地居民聚會及參與社交或文化活動的場所」？

example.text: The community center offers free language classes on Saturdays.

translation.zh-Hant: 社區中心每週六提供免費語言課程。

meaning.en: A local place where people gather for social or cultural activities.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供當地居民聚會及參與社交或文化活動的場所。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘focused attention’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將注意力集中在一件事上的行為或能力」？

example.text: The noise outside made concentration difficult during the meeting.

translation.zh-Hant: 外面的噪音讓人很難在會議中集中注意力。

meaning.en: The act or ability of directing close attention to one thing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將注意力集中在一件事上的行為或能力。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in a private manner’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「私下地，並預期資訊不會被透露」？

example.text: The manager spoke confidentially with each employee about the changes.

translation.zh-Hant: 經理私下與每位員工談論這些變動。

meaning.en: In a private manner, with the expectation that information will not be shared.
meaning.zh-Hant: 私下地，並預期資訊不會被透露。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘set up for use’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「設定或安排某物，使其可供特定用途使用」？

example.text: Please configure the printer before the new staff arrive.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在新進員工抵達前設定好印表機。

meaning.en: To set up or arrange something so it is ready for a particular use.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設定或安排某物，使其可供特定用途使用。

plainExpression: state that a claim is false

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘state that a claim is false’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「否認或顯示某項說法並不正確」？

example.text: The figures on the receipt contradict those shown on the invoice.

translation.zh-Hant: 收據上的數字與發票所列的數字相互矛盾。

meaning.en: To deny or show that a statement is not true.
meaning.zh-Hant: 否認或顯示某項說法並不正確。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘liquid medicine for coughing’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來舒緩喉嚨或減少咳嗽的液體藥物」？

example.text: The pharmacist suggested cough syrup to ease my sore throat.

translation.zh-Hant: 藥師建議我服用止咳糖漿來舒緩喉嚨痛。

meaning.en: A liquid medicine used to soothe the throat or reduce coughing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來舒緩喉嚨或減少咳嗽的液體藥物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘disturbing because of odd behavior’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因怪異或反常的行為而令人感到不適或反感的」？

example.text: The passenger's creepy behavior made others move to a different seat.

translation.zh-Hant: 那名乘客令人不舒服的怪異舉動，讓其他人換到別的座位。

meaning.en: Causing discomfort or repulsion because of strange or eccentric behavior.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因怪異或反常的行為而令人感到不適或反感的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who evaluates creative work’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「評析他人作品並提出評論的人」？

example.text: The restaurant critic praised the service but disliked the dessert.

translation.zh-Hant: 餐廳評論家稱讚服務，卻不喜歡甜點。

meaning.en: A person who evaluates and comments on the work of others.
meaning.zh-Hant: 評析他人作品並提出評論的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘online world of information’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「透過網際網路存取的線上資訊與通訊空間」？

example.text: Personal information can spread quickly through cyberspace.

translation.zh-Hant: 個人資訊可能在網路空間迅速傳播。

meaning.en: The online world of information and communication accessed through the internet.
meaning.zh-Hant: 透過網際網路存取的線上資訊與通訊空間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘no longer modern’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「已過時且不再適合當今使用的」？

example.text: The office still uses dated software that no longer receives updates.

translation.zh-Hant: 辦公室仍在使用已過時且不再更新的軟體。

meaning.en: Old-fashioned and no longer suitable for the present.
meaning.zh-Hant: 已過時且不再適合當今使用的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘large-scale forest removal’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「清除森林並將土地改作其他用途的過程」？

example.text: The new policy aims to reduce deforestation near protected areas.

translation.zh-Hant: 這項新政策旨在減少保護區附近的森林砍伐。

meaning.en: The process of clearing a forest and replacing it with another land use.
meaning.zh-Hant: 清除森林並將土地改作其他用途的過程。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘providing clear details’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「對某事物加以描述或提供細節的」？

example.text: The guide gives a descriptive account of each hiking route.

translation.zh-Hant: 這本指南詳細描述了每條健行路線。

meaning.en: Giving a description or providing details about something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 對某事物加以描述或提供細節的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘certificate of completed study’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「證明某人完成課程或取得學位的文件」？

example.text: She received her diploma after completing the two-year program.

translation.zh-Hant: 她完成兩年制課程後取得了畢業證書。

meaning.en: A document showing that someone completed a course of study or earned a degree.
meaning.zh-Hant: 證明某人完成課程或取得學位的文件。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘physical or emotional unease’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「身體或情緒上的不適與不安」？

example.text: Tell the dentist if you feel any discomfort during the procedure.

translation.zh-Hant: 療程中若有任何不適，請告訴牙醫。

meaning.en: Physical or emotional distress or unease.
meaning.zh-Hant: 身體或情緒上的不適與不安。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘with little wasted effort’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以盡量少耗費時間、心力或資源的方式取得成果」？

example.text: The new checkout system processes orders more efficiently.

translation.zh-Hant: 新的結帳系統能更有效率地處理訂單。

meaning.en: In a way that produces results with little wasted time, effort, or resources.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以盡量少耗費時間、心力或資源的方式取得成果。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘support that builds confidence’?

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「無意間漏掉、錯過或忘記的事」？

example.text: Leaving the attachment out of the email was an oversight.

translation.zh-Hant: 電子郵件漏掉附件是一時疏忽。

meaning.en: Something unintentionally left out, missed, or forgotten.
meaning.zh-Hant: 無意間漏掉、錯過或忘記的事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘small smooth rounded stone’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「小石頭，尤指經水流磨得光滑圓潤的石子」？

example.text: A pebble was stuck inside my hiking shoe.

translation.zh-Hant: 我的登山鞋裡卡了一顆小石子。

meaning.en: A small stone, especially one made smooth and rounded by water.
meaning.zh-Hant: 小石頭，尤指經水流磨得光滑圓潤的石子。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who expects the worst’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常預期最壞結果的人；悲觀者」？

example.text: Even the office pessimist admitted that the new plan might work.

translation.zh-Hant: 就連辦公室裡最悲觀的人也承認新計畫或許行得通。

meaning.en: A person who usually expects the worst outcome.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常預期最壞結果的人；悲觀者。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘extremely frightened’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「極度害怕的；嚇壞的」？

example.text: I was petrified when the elevator stopped between floors.

translation.zh-Hant: 電梯停在樓層之間時，我嚇壞了。

meaning.en: Extremely afraid.
meaning.zh-Hant: 極度害怕的；嚇壞的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘children's indoor play area’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供兒童玩耍的房間，也允許較吵鬧或活潑的活動」？

example.text: The hotel has a playroom where children can use toys safely.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店設有遊戲室，讓孩子可以安全地玩玩具。

meaning.en: A room set aside for children to play, including noisy or energetic activities.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供兒童玩耍的房間，也允許較吵鬧或活潑的活動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘thin fried potato slice’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「切成薄片後油炸至酥脆的馬鈴薯食品」？

example.text: I ate one potato chip while waiting for the train.

translation.zh-Hant: 我等火車時吃了一片洋芋片。

meaning.en: A thin slice of potato fried until crisp.
meaning.zh-Hant: 切成薄片後油炸至酥脆的馬鈴薯食品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘device providing electrical power’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為電子裝置的其他元件提供所需電壓的部件」？

example.text: The technician replaced the faulty power supply in the desktop computer.

translation.zh-Hant: 技術人員更換了桌上型電腦故障的電源供應器。

meaning.en: The part of an electronic device that supplies the voltages its other components need.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為電子裝置的其他元件提供所需電壓的部件。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘word placed before a noun’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「置於名詞或代名詞前，用來表示它與句中其他部分關係的單字或片語」？

example.text: In the phrase 'on the table,' 'on' is a preposition.

translation.zh-Hant: 在片語「on the table」中，on 是介系詞。

meaning.en: A word or multiword term placed before a noun or pronoun to show its relationship to another part of a sentence.
meaning.zh-Hant: 置於名詞或代名詞前，用來表示它與句中其他部分關係的單字或片語。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘media question-and-answer event’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為電視、報紙及其他新聞媒體舉行的問答活動」？

example.text: The company held a press conference to answer questions about the merger.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司舉行記者會，回答有關合併案的問題。

meaning.en: A question-and-answer session held for television, print, and other news media.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為電視、報紙及其他新聞媒體舉行的問答活動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘common in many places’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「常見或普遍存在的」？

example.text: Contactless payment is prevalent in major cities.

translation.zh-Hant: 感應式付款在大城市相當普遍。

meaning.en: Common or widespread.
meaning.zh-Hant: 常見或普遍存在的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘repeatedly putting tasks off’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「故意延後應做事項的行為或習慣」？

example.text: Her procrastination left her only one evening to finish the report.

translation.zh-Hant: 她一再拖延，最後只剩一個晚上能完成報告。

meaning.en: The act or habit of intentionally delaying something that should be done.
meaning.zh-Hant: 故意延後應做事項的行為或習慣。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘sweater worn over the head’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「前面沒有鈕扣或拉鍊，需從頭部套入的毛衣」？

example.text: She packed a warm pullover for the cool mountain evenings.

translation.zh-Hant: 她帶了一件保暖的套頭毛衣，以應付山區涼爽的夜晚。

meaning.en: A sweater without front buttons or a zipper that is pulled on over the head.
meaning.zh-Hant: 前面沒有鈕扣或拉鍊，需從頭部套入的毛衣。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘open to serious doubt’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「有疑點，可能受到質疑、挑戰或批評的」？

example.text: The invoice includes a questionable fee that the hotel cannot explain.

translation.zh-Hant: 帳單上有一筆飯店無法解釋、令人質疑的費用。

meaning.en: Open to doubt, challenge, or criticism.
meaning.zh-Hant: 有疑點，可能受到質疑、挑戰或批評的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘wet tropical forest’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「位於全年雨量豐沛且沒有乾季的氣候區域中的森林」？

example.text: Our guide explained how the rainforest stores water and supports wildlife.

translation.zh-Hant: 導遊說明雨林如何儲存水分並維持野生動物的生存。

meaning.en: A forest in a climate with heavy rainfall throughout the year and no dry season.
meaning.zh-Hant: 位於全年雨量豐沛且沒有乾季的氣候區域中的森林。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘confirm once more’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「再次確認某事，或使其更加確定」？

example.text: Please reconfirm your airport transfer the day before arrival.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在抵達前一天再次確認機場接送安排。

meaning.en: To confirm something again or establish it more firmly.
meaning.zh-Hant: 再次確認某事，或使其更加確定。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘light food and drinks’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「提供給賓客或參與者享用的簡單點心與飲料」？

example.text: Light refreshments will be served after the workshop.

translation.zh-Hant: 工作坊結束後將提供簡單茶點。

meaning.en: Light snacks and drinks served to guests or participants.
meaning.zh-Hant: 提供給賓客或參與者享用的簡單點心與飲料。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘install software again’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「再次安裝軟體或設備」？

example.text: The support agent asked me to reinstall the app after deleting the damaged files.

translation.zh-Hant: 客服人員請我刪除損壞的檔案後重新安裝應用程式。

meaning.en: To install software or equipment again.
meaning.zh-Hant: 再次安裝軟體或設備。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘helping someone feel calm’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「能幫助人放鬆並減輕緊張的」？

example.text: The quiet garden was a relaxing place to wait between appointments.

translation.zh-Hant: 安靜的花園是兩個行程之間放鬆等候的好地方。

meaning.en: Helping someone become calm and free from tension.
meaning.zh-Hant: 能幫助人放鬆並減輕緊張的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘open for business again’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「再次開啟某物，尤指在關閉一段時間後重新開放」？

example.text: The café will reopen on Monday after a short renovation.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家咖啡館短暫整修後，將於週一重新開業。

meaning.en: To open something again, especially after it has been closed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 再次開啟某物，尤指在關閉一段時間後重新開放。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘return to the initial state’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「使某物回到初始狀態或設定的動作」？

example.text: The technician performed a reset to restore the router's default settings.

translation.zh-Hant: 技術人員執行重設，將路由器恢復為預設設定。

meaning.en: The act of returning something to its initial state or settings.
meaning.zh-Hant: 使某物回到初始狀態或設定的動作。

plainExpression: in a polite and considerate manner

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in a polite and considerate manner’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以展現尊重與體諒的方式」？

example.text: She respectfully declined the invitation and thanked the host.

translation.zh-Hant: 她禮貌地婉拒邀請，並向主人道謝。

meaning.en: In a manner that shows respect and consideration.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以展現尊重與體諒的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘suitable for repeated use’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「可以再次使用，有時需先清潔或處理的」？

example.text: The hotel gives each guest a reusable water bottle.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店提供每位房客一個可重複使用的水瓶。

meaning.en: Able to be used again, sometimes after cleaning or processing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 可以再次使用，有時需先清潔或處理的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘device directing network traffic’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「把網路資料封包導向目的地的裝置」？

example.text: Restart the router if none of your devices can connect to the internet.

translation.zh-Hant: 如果所有裝置都無法連上網際網路，請重新啟動路由器。

meaning.en: A network device that directs data packets to their destinations.
meaning.zh-Hant: 把網路資料封包導向目的地的裝置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘shortage of available resources’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「某物供應不足或難以取得的狀況」？

example.text: A scarcity of rental cars pushed prices higher during the holiday.

translation.zh-Hant: 假日期間租車供應短缺，推高了價格。

meaning.en: The condition of something being in short supply or difficult to obtain.
meaning.zh-Hant: 某物供應不足或難以取得的狀況。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘underwater breathing equipment’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由壓縮空氣瓶與調節器組成的水下呼吸裝備」？

example.text: The diver checked her scuba equipment carefully before entering the water.

translation.zh-Hant: 潛水員下水前仔細檢查了水肺裝備。

meaning.en: Underwater breathing equipment consisting of a compressed-air tank and a regulator.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由壓縮空氣瓶與調節器組成的水下呼吸裝備。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘putting others before oneself’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「關心他人的需要，而不以自身利益為優先的」？

example.text: Her selfless decision gave another passenger the last seat on the bus.

translation.zh-Hant: 她無私地把公車上最後一個座位讓給另一位乘客。

meaning.en: Concerned with other people's needs rather than one's own.
meaning.zh-Hant: 關心他人的需要，而不以自身利益為優先的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘transport of goods’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「把貨物從一地運送到另一地的作業」？

example.text: Rail shipping can lower the cost of moving heavy goods.

translation.zh-Hant: 以鐵路運送重型貨物可以降低成本。

meaning.en: The transportation of goods from one place to another.
meaning.zh-Hant: 把貨物從一地運送到另一地的作業。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘small edible crustacean’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「有細長腳、長觸鬚與長腹部的小型水生甲殼動物，常作為食物」？

example.text: We added shrimp and vegetables to the noodles.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們在麵裡加入蝦子和蔬菜。

meaning.en: A small swimming crustacean with slender legs, long feelers, and a long abdomen, often eaten as food.
meaning.zh-Hant: 有細長腳、長觸鬚與長腹部的小型水生甲殼動物，常作為食物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘state of being ill’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「生病的狀態，或某種疾病」？

example.text: His sickness kept him home from work for several days.

translation.zh-Hant: 他因病在家休養了好幾天，無法上班。

meaning.en: The state of being sick or a particular illness.
meaning.zh-Hant: 生病的狀態，或某種疾病。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘mean or indicate something’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「表示、代表或指出某事」？

example.text: A flashing red light may signify that the battery is low.

translation.zh-Hant: 紅燈閃爍可能表示電池電量不足。

meaning.en: To mean, represent, or indicate something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 表示、代表或指出某事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘doubtful and unconvinced’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「懷疑某事是否真實或可靠的」？

example.text: The buyer was skeptical of a deal that seemed too good to be true.

translation.zh-Hant: 買方對這個好得令人難以置信的交易抱持懷疑。

meaning.en: Having or expressing doubt about whether something is true or reliable.
meaning.zh-Hant: 懷疑某事是否真實或可靠的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘impressive public display’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「令人興奮、印象深刻或非比尋常的景象或表演」？

example.text: The evening parade was a colorful spectacle for visitors.

translation.zh-Hant: 夜間遊行對遊客而言是一場色彩繽紛的精彩盛會。

meaning.en: An exciting, impressive, or extraordinary scene or performance.
meaning.zh-Hant: 令人興奮、印象深刻或非比尋常的景象或表演。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘married partner’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與某人具有婚姻關係的伴侶；配偶」？

example.text: Employees may add a spouse to the company health plan.

translation.zh-Hant: 員工可以把配偶加入公司的健康保險方案。

meaning.en: A person's partner in a marriage.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與某人具有婚姻關係的伴侶；配偶。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘short race at full speed’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以最快速度完成的短距離賽跑」？

example.text: She won the final sprint by less than a second.

translation.zh-Hant: 她在最後的短跑項目中以不到一秒的差距獲勝。

meaning.en: A short race run at top speed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以最快速度完成的短距離賽跑。

plainExpression: wheeled chair for a young child

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘wheeled chair for a young child’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由後方推動、用來載送嬰兒或幼童的有輪座椅」？

example.text: The airline let us check the stroller at the boarding gate.

translation.zh-Hant: 航空公司讓我們在登機門托運嬰兒推車。

meaning.en: A wheeled chair pushed from behind to transport a baby or young child.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由後方推動、用來載送嬰兒或幼童的有輪座椅。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘following one after another’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在一連串事物中一個接著一個出現的」？

example.text: Sales increased for three successive months.

translation.zh-Hant: 銷售額連續三個月成長。

meaning.en: Following one after another in a series.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在一連串事物中一個接著一個出現的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘loose casual athletic top’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「原本供運動時穿著、現在也常作為休閒服的寬鬆保暖針織上衣」？

example.text: He wore a sweatshirt for the early morning walk.

translation.zh-Hant: 他穿著運動衫去晨間散步。

meaning.en: A loose, warm knit top originally worn for exercise and now also used as casual clothing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 原本供運動時穿著、現在也常作為休閒服的寬鬆保暖針織上衣。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘edible starchy plant tuber’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「甘藷植物可食用的塊根，煮熟後作為蔬菜食用，也就是地瓜」？

example.text: The lunch set includes a baked sweet potato and a salad.

translation.zh-Hant: 這份午餐套餐包含一條烤地瓜和一份沙拉。

meaning.en: The edible tuber of the sweet potato plant, cooked and eaten as a vegetable.
meaning.zh-Hant: 甘藷植物可食用的塊根，煮熟後作為蔬菜食用，也就是地瓜。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘share another person's feelings’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「理解並感受他人的心情，尤指對方的痛苦或困境」？

example.text: I sympathize with commuters affected by the long delay.

translation.zh-Hant: 我很同情受到長時間誤點影響的通勤族。

meaning.en: To understand and share another person's feelings, especially distress or difficulty.
meaning.zh-Hant: 理解並感受他人的心情，尤指對方的痛苦或困境。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘word with the same meaning’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與另一個單字或片語意義相同或相近的詞語」？

example.text: The teacher explained that rapid is a synonym for fast.

translation.zh-Hant: 老師說明 rapid 是 fast 的同義詞。

meaning.en: A word or phrase with the same or nearly the same meaning as another.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與另一個單字或片語意義相同或相近的詞語。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘according to the exact facts’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「依照精確事實或詞語的嚴格用法而言，即使一般說法有所不同」？

example.text: The ticket is technically valid only for the train printed on it.

translation.zh-Hant: 嚴格來說，這張票只適用於票面所列的那班火車。

meaning.en: According to precise facts or a strict use of terms, even if common usage differs.
meaning.zh-Hant: 依照精確事實或詞語的嚴格用法而言，即使一般說法有所不同。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘skilled equipment specialist’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「對特定技術或設備具有專業實務知識的人員」？

example.text: A technician repaired the air conditioner before the guests arrived.

translation.zh-Hant: 技術人員在房客抵達前修好了冷氣。

meaning.en: A person with expert practical knowledge of a particular technology or type of equipment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 對特定技術或設備具有專業實務知識的人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘switch between two settings’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「使用同一個控制元件，在兩個位置或設定之間切換」？

example.text: Use this button to toggle the display between light and dark modes.

translation.zh-Hant: 使用這個按鈕，在淺色與深色模式之間切換顯示。

meaning.en: To alternate between two positions or settings with one control.
meaning.zh-Hant: 使用同一個控制元件，在兩個位置或設定之間切換。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘damage from dental caries’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因齲齒造成的牙齒損壞，也就是蛀牙」？

example.text: Regular checkups can detect tooth decay before it causes severe pain.

translation.zh-Hant: 定期檢查可以在蛀牙引發劇痛前及早發現。

meaning.en: Damage to a tooth caused by dental caries.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因齲齒造成的牙齒損壞，也就是蛀牙。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘sending signals or power’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「把資料、訊號或電力從一地傳送到另一地的行為」？

example.text: The new cable improves the transmission of data between the two offices.

translation.zh-Hant: 新電纜改善了兩間辦公室之間的資料傳輸。

meaning.en: The act of sending data, signals, or electric power from one place to another.
meaning.zh-Hant: 把資料、訊號或電力從一地傳送到另一地的行為。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘plastic sack for household waste’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來裝盛並丟棄家庭垃圾的塑膠袋」？

example.text: Please tie the trash bag securely before taking it downstairs.

translation.zh-Hant: 把垃圾拿下樓前，請先把垃圾袋綁緊。

meaning.en: A plastic bag used to hold household waste for disposal.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來裝盛並丟棄家庭垃圾的塑膠袋。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘container for discarded waste’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供人丟棄廢棄物的容器；垃圾桶」？

example.text: There is a trash can beside the vending machine.

translation.zh-Hant: 販賣機旁邊有一個垃圾桶。

meaning.en: A container into which waste materials are discarded.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供人丟棄廢棄物的容器；垃圾桶。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘to an extremely great degree’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「達到極大的程度；非常地」？

example.text: Customer satisfaction improved tremendously after checkout became faster.

translation.zh-Hant: 結帳速度加快後，顧客滿意度大幅提升。

meaning.en: To an extremely great degree; enormously.
meaning.zh-Hant: 達到極大的程度；非常地。

plainExpression: small tool for gripping fine objects

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘small tool for gripping fine objects’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來夾取、拿起或移除細小物品的小型鉗狀工具」？

example.text: She used tweezers to remove a small splinter from her finger.

translation.zh-Hant: 她用鑷子拔出手指上的一小根木刺。

meaning.en: A small pincer-like tool used to grip, pick up, or remove small objects.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來夾取、拿起或移除細小物品的小型鉗狀工具。

plainExpression: in a way that causes discomfort

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in a way that causes discomfort’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以令人感到身體或心理不適的方式」？

example.text: The passenger shifted uncomfortably in the narrow seat.

translation.zh-Hant: 乘客在狹窄的座位上不舒服地挪動身體。

meaning.en: In a way that causes physical or emotional discomfort.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以令人感到身體或心理不適的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘impossible to restrain or manage’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「無法控制、遏止或約束的」？

example.text: Strong winds made the fire uncontrollable within minutes.

translation.zh-Hant: 強風使火勢在幾分鐘內變得無法控制。

meaning.en: Not able to be controlled, contained, or governed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 無法控制、遏止或約束的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘unwilling to work with others’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不願合作，也不願配合共同工作的」？

example.text: The supplier became uncooperative when we asked for the missing documents.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們要求補交缺少的文件時，供應商變得不願配合。

meaning.en: Unwilling to cooperate or help with a shared effort.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不願合作，也不願配合共同工作的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘easy enough to comprehend’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「能夠被理解或領會的」？

example.text: The revised instructions are short and understandable.

translation.zh-Hant: 修訂後的說明簡短易懂。

meaning.en: Able to be understood or comprehended.
meaning.zh-Hant: 能夠被理解或領會的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘not heard by anyone’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「沒有被任何人聽見的」？

example.text: Her warning went unheard in the noisy station.

translation.zh-Hant: 車站太吵，她的警告沒有人聽見。

meaning.en: Not heard by anyone.
meaning.zh-Hant: 沒有被任何人聽見的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘not occurring naturally’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「並非自然形成，或不符合正常、真實狀態的」？

example.text: The fruit's bright blue color looked unnatural under normal light.

translation.zh-Hant: 在一般光線下，這種水果的亮藍色看起來很不自然。

meaning.en: Not natural or not occurring in a normal, genuine way.
meaning.zh-Hant: 並非自然形成，或不符合正常、真實狀態的。

plainExpression: expensive and aimed at wealthy customers

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘expensive and aimed at wealthy customers’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「價格昂貴，並以富裕消費者為主要客群的」？

example.text: The renovated building now contains several upscale restaurants.

translation.zh-Hant: 翻修後的大樓現在有好幾家高檔餐廳。

meaning.en: Expensive and designed to appeal to affluent consumers.
meaning.zh-Hant: 價格昂貴，並以富裕消費者為主要客群的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘stomach pain or discomfort’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「胃部疼痛或不適；胃痛」？

example.text: I developed an upset stomach after eating too quickly.

translation.zh-Hant: 我吃得太快，後來胃不舒服。

meaning.en: Pain or discomfort in the stomach; a stomachache.
meaning.zh-Hant: 胃部疼痛或不適；胃痛。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘simulated interactive digital environment’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「建立模擬環境，讓使用者能像親臨現場般互動的電腦技術」？

example.text: The museum uses virtual reality to let visitors explore an ancient city.

translation.zh-Hant: 博物館利用虛擬實境，讓參觀者探索一座古城。

meaning.en: Computer technology that creates a simulated environment users can interact with as if physically present.
meaning.zh-Hant: 建立模擬環境，讓使用者能像親臨現場般互動的電腦技術。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who performs songs’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「唱歌的人，尤指從事表演的歌手」？

example.text: The band hired a new vocalist for its weekend performances.

translation.zh-Hant: 樂團為週末演出聘請了一位新主唱。

meaning.en: A person who sings, especially as a performer.
meaning.zh-Hant: 唱歌的人，尤指從事表演的歌手。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in or near what place’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在何處，或在何處附近」？

example.text: Do you know whereabouts the station entrance is?

translation.zh-Hant: 你知道車站入口大約在哪裡嗎？

meaning.en: In, at, or near what location.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在何處，或在何處附近。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘while by contrast’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來引出與前一句形成對比的敘述」？

example.text: The morning flight is direct, whereas the evening flight requires a transfer.

translation.zh-Hant: 早班機是直飛，晚班機則需要轉機。

meaning.en: Used to introduce a statement that contrasts with the previous one.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來引出與前一句形成對比的敘述。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘fast-spreading fire in the wild’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「迅速蔓延的火災，尤指發生在森林、草原或其他野外地區的火災」？

example.text: Firefighters contained the wildfire before it reached nearby homes.

translation.zh-Hant: 消防人員在野火蔓延到附近住宅前控制住了火勢。

meaning.en: A rapidly spreading fire, especially in a forest, grassland, or other wild area.
meaning.zh-Hant: 迅速蔓延的火災，尤指發生在森林、草原或其他野外地區的火災。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘to an unusually extreme degree’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「達到極端或極度誇張的程度」？

example.text: The first cost estimate was wildly inaccurate.

translation.zh-Hant: 第一份成本估算極不準確。

meaning.en: To an extreme or greatly exaggerated degree.
meaning.zh-Hant: 達到極端或極度誇張的程度。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘software for creating formatted documents’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來撰寫、編輯及排版文字文件的電腦軟體」？

example.text: She used a word processor to format the meeting notes.

translation.zh-Hant: 她使用文書處理軟體排版會議紀錄。

meaning.en: Computer software for writing, editing, and formatting text documents.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來撰寫、編輯及排版文字文件的電腦軟體。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘general view of life’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「對人生與世界所抱持的整體看法或哲學」？

example.text: Living abroad changed her worldview and daily priorities.

translation.zh-Hant: 在國外生活改變了她的世界觀與日常生活的優先順序。

meaning.en: A general philosophy or view of life and the world.
meaning.zh-Hant: 對人生與世界所抱持的整體看法或哲學。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘very pleasant to eat’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「味道很好、吃起來很美味的」？

example.text: The soup is simple but really yummy.

translation.zh-Hant: 這道湯很簡單，但真的很好吃。

meaning.en: Delicious or very pleasant to eat.
meaning.zh-Hant: 味道很好、吃起來很美味的。

plainExpression: moving images made from still frames

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘moving images made from still frames’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「快速連續播放靜止影像以營造動態效果的技術，或以此方式製作的作品」？

example.text: The animation uses hundreds of drawings to show the bird in flight.

translation.zh-Hant: 這段動畫使用數百張圖畫呈現鳥兒飛行的樣子。

meaning.en: A sequence of still images shown rapidly to create the illusion of movement, or a work produced this way.
meaning.zh-Hant: 快速連續播放靜止影像以營造動態效果的技術，或以此方式製作的作品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘quiet little laugh’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「輕聲或壓抑著發出的笑聲」？

example.text: His joke drew a quiet chuckle from the waiting passengers.

translation.zh-Hant: 他的笑話讓等候中的乘客輕聲笑了出來。

meaning.en: A quiet or partly suppressed laugh.
meaning.zh-Hant: 輕聲或壓抑著發出的笑聲。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘punctuation separating sentence elements’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來分隔句子成分或清單項目的標點符號」？

example.text: Add a comma between each item in the list.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在清單中的每個項目之間加上逗號。

meaning.en: The punctuation mark used to separate parts of a sentence or items in a list.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來分隔句子成分或清單項目的標點符號。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘living community and its environment’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「生物群落與其環境共同運作所形成的整體」？

example.text: Polluted water can damage the entire river ecosystem.

translation.zh-Hant: 受污染的水可能破壞整個河川生態系。

meaning.en: A community of living things and its environment functioning together as a unit.
meaning.zh-Hant: 生物群落與其環境共同運作所形成的整體。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘visual display of numerical relationships’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「呈現多組數字或測量值之間關係的視覺圖表」？

example.text: The graph shows how monthly sales changed over the year.

translation.zh-Hant: 這張圖表顯示每月銷售額在一年中的變化。

meaning.en: A visual chart that shows relationships between sets of numbers or measurements.
meaning.zh-Hant: 呈現多組數字或測量值之間關係的視覺圖表。

plainExpression: device that turns signals into sound

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘device that turns signals into sound’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「把電信號轉換成可聽見聲音的裝置」？

example.text: The station announcement came through a loudspeaker above the platform.

translation.zh-Hant: 車站廣播透過月台上方的揚聲器播放。

meaning.en: A device that converts an electrical signal into audible sound.
meaning.zh-Hant: 把電信號轉換成可聽見聲音的裝置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘encourage someone to take action’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「給予某人採取行動的理由或動力」？

example.text: Clear goals can motivate employees to improve their work.

translation.zh-Hant: 明確的目標可以激勵員工改善工作表現。

meaning.en: To give someone a reason or incentive to take action.
meaning.zh-Hant: 給予某人採取行動的理由或動力。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘form used to collect information’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「列有一系列問題、用來蒐集調查資料的表格」？

example.text: Please complete the questionnaire before your medical appointment.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在看診前填妥問卷。

meaning.en: A form containing questions used to collect information for a survey.
meaning.zh-Hant: 列有一系列問題、用來蒐集調查資料的表格。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘shaped slab covering a surface’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「固定在表面上、用來覆蓋或裝飾的規則形板材」？

example.text: The contractor replaced a cracked tile on the bathroom wall.

translation.zh-Hant: 承包商更換了浴室牆上一塊破裂的磁磚。

meaning.en: A regularly shaped slab fixed in place to cover or decorate a surface.
meaning.zh-Hant: 固定在表面上、用來覆蓋或裝飾的規則形板材。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘violently rotating funnel of wind’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「從雲層延伸到地面、劇烈旋轉的漏斗狀風柱」？

example.text: The warning urged residents to take shelter before the tornado arrived.

translation.zh-Hant: 警報呼籲居民在龍捲風抵達前進入安全處避難。

meaning.en: A violently rotating funnel of wind that extends from a cloud to the ground.
meaning.zh-Hant: 從雲層延伸到地面、劇烈旋轉的漏斗狀風柱。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘intended recipient of a message’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「信件、訊息或包裹預定送達的個人或機構」？

example.text: The courier asked the addressee to sign for the package.

translation.zh-Hant: 快遞員請收件人簽收包裹。

meaning.en: The person or organization for whom a letter, message, or package is intended.
meaning.zh-Hant: 信件、訊息或包裹預定送達的個人或機構。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who writes online posts’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「撰寫部落格或為線上日誌供稿的人」？

example.text: The travel blogger shared practical tips for using local buses.

translation.zh-Hant: 這位旅遊部落客分享了搭乘當地公車的實用建議。

meaning.en: A person who writes or contributes to a blog or online journal.
meaning.zh-Hant: 撰寫部落格或為線上日誌供稿的人。

plainExpression: state of having nothing interesting to do

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘state of having nothing interesting to do’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因沒有有趣或吸引人的事可做而感到無聊的狀態」？

example.text: She brought a book to avoid boredom during the long wait.

translation.zh-Hant: 她帶了一本書，以免長時間等候時感到無聊。

meaning.en: The state of feeling bored because nothing is interesting or engaging.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因沒有有趣或吸引人的事可做而感到無聊的狀態。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘cause overwhelming grief or shock’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「使人感到極度悲痛、沮喪或意志消沉」？

example.text: The loss of a loved one can devastate an entire family.

translation.zh-Hant: 失去摯愛可能使整個家庭陷入極度悲痛。

meaning.en: To cause someone intense grief, dismay, or loss of morale.
meaning.zh-Hant: 使人感到極度悲痛、沮喪或意志消沉。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘passionate supporter of an activity’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「熱烈支持某人或某項活動的人」？

example.text: As a cycling enthusiast, he plans trips around safe bike routes.

translation.zh-Hant: 身為自行車運動愛好者，他會依照安全的自行車路線規劃旅程。

meaning.en: An ardent and enthusiastic supporter of a person or activity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 熱烈支持某人或某項活動的人。

plainExpression: explosive device for a colorful display

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘explosive device for a colorful display’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「裝有爆炸性化學物質，點燃後會產生彩色火焰、火花、聲響或在空中爆開的裝置」？

example.text: A single firework lit the sky above the harbor.

translation.zh-Hant: 一枚煙火照亮了港口上方的夜空。

meaning.en: A device containing explosive chemicals that produces colored flames, sparks, sounds, or an aerial burst when lit.
meaning.zh-Hant: 裝有爆炸性化學物質，點燃後會產生彩色火焰、火花、聲響或在空中爆開的裝置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘extremely popular cultural figure’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「具有文化代表性，或特別受歡迎的人物；偶像」？

example.text: The young actor became a television idol after the series aired.

translation.zh-Hant: 這部影集播出後，那位年輕演員成了電視偶像。

meaning.en: A cultural icon or an especially popular person.
meaning.zh-Hant: 具有文化代表性，或特別受歡迎的人物；偶像。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘worth remembering’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因重要或非比尋常而值得記住的」？

example.text: The guide made our first visit to the city truly memorable.

translation.zh-Hant: 導遊讓我們第一次造訪這座城市的經驗非常難忘。

meaning.en: Worthy of being remembered because it is important or remarkable.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因重要或非比尋常而值得記住的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who conducts systematic study’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「透過謹慎且有系統的研究來發現或驗證資訊的人」？

example.text: The researcher interviewed commuters about their travel habits.

translation.zh-Hant: 研究人員訪談通勤族，了解他們的出行習慣。

meaning.en: A person who conducts careful, systematic study to discover or verify information.
meaning.zh-Hant: 透過謹慎且有系統的研究來發現或驗證資訊的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘paved strip for aircraft’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供飛機起飛與降落、通常鋪設過的長條形地面」？

example.text: The plane waited on the runway until the storm passed.

translation.zh-Hant: 飛機在跑道上等候，直到暴風雨過去。

meaning.en: A usually paved strip of land where aircraft take off and land.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供飛機起飛與降落、通常鋪設過的長條形地面。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘post carrying a direction sign’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「立有方向指示牌的柱子；路標」？

example.text: A signpost at the intersection points toward the bus terminal.

translation.zh-Hant: 十字路口的路標指向公車轉運站。

meaning.en: A post bearing a sign that provides directions.
meaning.zh-Hant: 立有方向指示牌的柱子；路標。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘lie in sunlight for pleasure’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「讓身體曬太陽，以放鬆或使膚色變深」？

example.text: We chose to sunbathe briefly in the morning and used sunscreen.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們選擇在早上短暫曬太陽，並塗了防曬乳。

meaning.en: To expose one's body to sunlight for relaxation or to develop a tan.
meaning.zh-Hant: 讓身體曬太陽，以放鬆或使膚色變深。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘with worry and uncertainty’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「帶著憂慮與令人不安的不確定感」？

example.text: The passengers waited anxiously for news about the delayed flight.

translation.zh-Hant: 乘客焦急地等待班機延誤的最新消息。

meaning.en: In a worried manner, with distressing uncertainty.
meaning.zh-Hant: 帶著憂慮與令人不安的不確定感。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘exempt from customs tax’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「免除稅費的，尤指免徵關稅的」？

example.text: Travelers can buy duty-free goods after passing through passport control.

translation.zh-Hant: 旅客通過護照查驗後，可以購買免稅商品。

meaning.en: Exempt from a tax or charge, especially customs duty.
meaning.zh-Hant: 免除稅費的，尤指免徵關稅的。

plainExpression: keeping the body healthy and strong

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘keeping the body healthy and strong’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「培養並維持健康強健體魄的活動」？

example.text: Regular walking improved her fitness and energy level.

translation.zh-Hant: 規律走路改善了她的體能與活力。

meaning.en: The practice of developing and maintaining a healthy, strong body.
meaning.zh-Hant: 培養並維持健康強健體魄的活動。

plainExpression: punctuation used after a direct question

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘punctuation used after a direct question’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「放在句尾、用來表示疑問的標點符號」？

example.text: Put a question mark at the end of the sentence if it asks something.

translation.zh-Hant: 如果句子是在提問，請在句尾加上問號。

meaning.en: The punctuation mark used at the end of a sentence to indicate a question.
meaning.zh-Hant: 放在句尾、用來表示疑問的標點符號。

plainExpression: boundary where land meets the sea

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘boundary where land meets the sea’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「陸地與海洋交界處所形成的海岸輪廓或邊界」？

example.text: The map shows how the coastline curves around the bay.

translation.zh-Hant: 地圖顯示海岸線如何沿著海灣彎曲。

meaning.en: The shape or boundary of a coast where the land meets the sea.
meaning.zh-Hant: 陸地與海洋交界處所形成的海岸輪廓或邊界。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘movable on-screen pointer’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在螢幕上移動、用來顯示指標裝置位置的圖示」？

example.text: Move the cursor over the file and click once.

translation.zh-Hant: 把游標移到檔案上，然後按一下。

meaning.en: A movable on-screen icon that shows the position of a pointing device.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在螢幕上移動、用來顯示指標裝置位置的圖示。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘gated entrance passage’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「可以用門關閉的入口通道」？

example.text: Visitors entered the courtyard through a narrow gateway.

translation.zh-Hant: 訪客穿過狹窄的門道進入庭院。

meaning.en: An entrance passage that can be closed with a gate.
meaning.zh-Hant: 可以用門關閉的入口通道。

plainExpression: worker who installs and repairs pipes

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘worker who installs and repairs pipes’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「負責安裝與維修管線、衛浴設備及相關器具的技師」？

example.text: The hotel called a plumber to repair the leaking sink.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店請水管技師來修理漏水的洗手台。

meaning.en: A skilled worker who installs and repairs pipes, fixtures, and related appliances.
meaning.zh-Hant: 負責安裝與維修管線、衛浴設備及相關器具的技師。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘get something back’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「重新取得或取回某物」？

example.text: I returned to the café to retrieve my forgotten umbrella.

translation.zh-Hant: 我回到咖啡館取回忘在那裡的雨傘。

meaning.en: To regain or get back something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 重新取得或取回某物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘problem that delays progress’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「拖慢或阻礙進展的障礙、延誤或不利事件」？

example.text: The missing permit caused a setback in the construction schedule.

translation.zh-Hant: 缺少許可證使工程進度遭遇挫折。

meaning.en: An obstacle, delay, or adverse event that slows or prevents progress.
meaning.zh-Hant: 拖慢或阻礙進展的障礙、延誤或不利事件。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘general rule that guides action’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為行動或行為提供方向的一般規則或原則」？

example.text: The clinic issued a guideline for handling appointment cancellations.

translation.zh-Hant: 診所發布了處理取消預約的指導原則。

meaning.en: A general rule or principle that provides direction for action or behavior.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為行動或行為提供方向的一般規則或原則。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ability to move freely’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「移動或行動的能力」？

example.text: The new walking aid improved his mobility around the house.

translation.zh-Hant: 新的助行器提升了他在家中行動的能力。

meaning.en: The ability or capacity to move.
meaning.zh-Hant: 移動或行動的能力。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘knives forks and spoons’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「刀、叉和湯匙等餐具，不一定由銀製成」？

example.text: The server placed clean silverware beside each plate.

translation.zh-Hant: 服務生在每個盤子旁擺上乾淨的刀、叉和湯匙。

meaning.en: Knives, forks, and spoons, whether or not they are made of silver.
meaning.zh-Hant: 刀、叉和湯匙等餐具，不一定由銀製成。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘program for organizing tabular data’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用表格整理、分析及儲存資料的電腦應用程式」？

example.text: She created a spreadsheet to track travel expenses.

translation.zh-Hant: 她建立了一份試算表來追蹤旅費。

meaning.en: A computer application for organizing, analyzing, and storing data in tables.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用表格整理、分析及儲存資料的電腦應用程式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ability to remain steady’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「處於平衡、穩固且不易改變的狀態」？

example.text: The broad base gives the floor lamp greater stability.

translation.zh-Hant: 寬大的底座讓落地燈更加穩固。

meaning.en: The condition of being balanced, steady, and resistant to change.
meaning.zh-Hant: 處於平衡、穩固且不易改變的狀態。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘device for timing elapsed intervals’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來測量從啟動到停止之間經過時間的計時器」？

example.text: The coach used a stopwatch to time each runner.

translation.zh-Hant: 教練使用秒錶記錄每位跑者的時間。

meaning.en: A timepiece designed to measure the time elapsed between its start and stop.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來測量從啟動到停止之間經過時間的計時器。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘on-screen text showing spoken dialogue’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「顯示電影、電視節目或類似媒體中對話內容的螢幕文字」？

translation.zh-Hant: 演員說話時，每句字幕都出現在螢幕下方。

meaning.en: On-screen text showing the dialogue of a film, television program, or similar media.
meaning.zh-Hant: 顯示電影、電視節目或類似媒體中對話內容的螢幕文字。
